zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel FitzWilliam於1445年出生在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，她的父親William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough29歲，母親Elizabeth de Chaworth27歲。她於大約1460年與William Wentworth Esq在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1529年11月11日在英國艾可格斯費爾德享年84歲，埋葬在英國越可爾溫特沃思。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel FitzWilliam于1445年出生在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，她的父亲William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Chaworth27岁。她于大约1460年与William Wentworth Esq在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1529年11月11日在英国艾可格斯費爾德享年84岁，埋葬在英国越可爾溫特沃思。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel FitzWilliam was born in 1445, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, her father, William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Chaworth, was 27. She married William Wentworth Esq about 1460, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 November 1529, in Gosfield, Essex, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Wentworth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel FitzWilliam est née en 1445, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Chaworth, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Wentworth Esq environ 1460, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1529, à Gosfield, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Wentworth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel FitzWilliam 1445 in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Chaworth 27. Sie hat um 1460 in England William Wentworth Esq geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. November 1529 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Gosfield, Essex, England und wurde in Wentworth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliamが1445年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父William FitzWilliam of Sprotboroughは29歳，母Elizabeth de Chaworthは27歳であった。約1460年にイギリスでWilliam Wentworth Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1529年11月11日にイギリスエセックスゴスフィールドで84歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエントウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzWilliam(이)가 1445년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Chaworth(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국에서 William Wentworth Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1529년 11월 11일 영국 에세스 고스필드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웬트워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel FitzWilliam nasceu em 1445, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Chaworth, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wentworth Esq aproximadamente 1460, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1529, em Gosfield, Essex, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Wentworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel FitzWilliam родилась в 1445 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Chaworth, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wentworth Esq около 1460 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 ноября 1529 г. в местности госфиелд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности вентворт, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con William Wentworth Esq aproximadamente 1460, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
